Your favorite badge-hunting badgers return for Untappd Badgevent Week, and you've unlocked Day 5, the final day of this inaugural set of badges.

This holiday season, let’s raise our glasses to the wild ride that has been 2025 and toast to all the good times we had along the way!

Celebrate Lager Day 2025 by embracing life with a crisp, cold-fermented lager. Inspired by the Hop Culture x Untappd Live Laugh Lager shirt and this year's hop-centric stories, this badge invites you to raise a glass of helles, pilsner, or any lager that makes you smile between December 10–15, 2025. Life is short—live, laugh, lager!

Thanks to every one of you for making this beautifully diverse community what it is today! Let’s raise our glasses, check in a brew, earn this badge, and cheers to the next 15 years of memories with you! Check in any one (1) beverage between October 22 and 27, 2025. Cheers!
